title: Manufacturing Engineer - Ambuja Cements - Experienced Professionals

jsonLd.title: Manufacturing Engineer - Ambuja Cements - Experienced Professionals
jsonLd.description:
We at Ambuja Cements are looking for an experienced Manufacturing Engineer based out of Nashik. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Ambuja Cements:
Ambuja Cements is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels
• Maintain accurate production records and prepare daily reports

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in Six Sigma
• Proficiency in SAP MM/PP
• Proficiency in PLC/SCADA
• Proficiency in Quality Control
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Referral bonus program
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Nashik, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Ambuja Cements!
